title: Emergency Preparedness Quiz - How Ready Are You? | CrunchMilk
metaDescription: Assess your emergency preparedness with this free 8-question quiz. Evaluate your supplies, financial safety net, insurance, and emergency plans.
tagline: If disaster struck tomorrow, how prepared would you be?

questions.question: How many months of essential expenses do you have in liquid savings?

options.text: Less than 1 month
1-2 months
3-5 months
6+ months in a dedicated emergency fund

questions.question: Do you have emergency supplies at home (water, food, first aid, flashlights)?

options.text: No emergency supplies at all
A few basics but not organized
A stocked kit that could last 3 days
A comprehensive kit for 7+ days with rotation schedule

questions.question: Does your household have a communication and meeting plan for emergencies?

options.text: We've never discussed what to do in an emergency
We'd probably just call each other
We have a basic plan with an out-of-state contact
We have a detailed plan with meeting points, contacts, and practice drills

questions.question: How comprehensive is your insurance coverage?

options.text: I have minimal or no insurance
Basic health and auto only
Health, auto, home/renter's with decent coverage
Full coverage including disability, umbrella, and flood/earthquake if applicable

questions.question: Do you have copies of important documents stored safely?

options.text: I'd have trouble finding my important documents
They're somewhere in the house
I have copies in a fireproof safe or safety deposit box
Physical copies secured plus digital backups in the cloud

questions.question: Could you access your money if your primary bank was inaccessible?

options.text: All my money is in one account at one bank
I have accounts at two places but no cash on hand
I have backup accounts and some cash at home
Multiple bank accounts, cash reserve, and I know my account numbers by heart

questions.question: How prepared is your home for natural disasters common to your area?

options.text: I don't know what disasters are likely in my area
I know the risks but haven't prepared specifically
I've taken some steps (e.g., strapping water heater, trimming trees)
Fully prepared with specific measures, shutoff knowledge, and tested plans

questions.question: Do you have backup power and communication capabilities?

options.text: No backup power or communication options
I have a phone charger bank and that's about it
I have a generator or solar charger and battery-powered radio
Generator with fuel, solar backup, radio, and alternative communication plan

scoreRanges.label: Vulnerable
scoreRanges.analysis: You're significantly unprepared for emergencies. Start with the three basics: build a small emergency fund, put together a 72-hour supply kit, and create a family communication plan. These steps alone will dramatically improve your readiness.

scoreRanges.label: Partially Prepared
scoreRanges.analysis: You have some foundations but major gaps remain. Focus on building your emergency fund to 3-6 months of expenses and ensuring your insurance coverage is adequate for your situation.

scoreRanges.label: Well Prepared
scoreRanges.analysis: You're in good shape for most emergencies. Consider upgrading your document backup system, reviewing insurance for any gaps, and expanding your supply kit from 3 days to 7+ days.

scoreRanges.label: Highly Resilient
scoreRanges.analysis: Excellent preparedness across all dimensions. You've built financial, physical, and logistical resilience. Keep maintaining your supplies, reviewing your plans annually, and staying current on regional risks.
